summary: Completed comprehensive testing of B2B virtual products in cart. All 11 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed: B2B products (print-businesscard, print-catalog, our-catalog-physical, our-catalog-digital) render correctly in /varukorg with names, prices, badges, and lucide-react icons. Cart summary calculates totals correctly. Quantity +/- buttons and delete buttons work for B2B items. Regular products still render normally (no regression). Header cart badge shows correct item count.
critical_code_review_comments: useCartData.js: Correctly intercepts virtual product IDs (print-*, our-catalog*) before API call and provides fallback metadata
useCartData.js: isVirtual() function properly identifies B2B products by ID prefix
CartItemCard.js: isEditable() correctly excludes B2B customization types (businesscard, print_catalog, our_catalog) from edit button
CartItemCard.js: Fallback icons use lucide-react (CreditCard, BookOpen, FileText) instead of broken HTML entities
CartItemCard.js: isVirtualProduct check correctly identifies products by ID prefix for link behavior
pricing.js: calculatePricing correctly handles items with price from cart item or product lookup
CartContext.js: itemCount correctly sums quantities across all items including B2B virtual products
seed_data_creation: Created test B2B cart items during testing (print-businesscard, print-catalog, our-catalog-physical, our-catalog-digital)
context_for_next_testing_agent: B2B virtual products in cart fully tested. Virtual product IDs: 'print-businesscard', 'print-catalog', 'our-catalog-physical', 'our-catalog-digital'. These are intercepted in useCartData.js before API call. CartItemCard.js uses lucide-react icons (CreditCard for businesscard, BookOpen for our_catalog, FileText for print_catalog). B2B items are not editable (isEditable returns false for businesscard, print_catalog, our_catalog types). Cart API: POST /api/cart/{session_id}/items, GET /api/cart/{session_id}, PUT /api/cart/{session_id}/items/{cart_item_id}?quantity=N, DELETE /api/cart/{session_id}/items/{cart_item_id}.

B2B Virtual Products in Cart UI.print-businesscard renders: ✓ Shows name, price, quantity, 'Visitkort — {template}' badge, CreditCard icon
B2B Virtual Products in Cart UI.print-catalog renders: ✓ Shows name, price, quantity, 'Katalogutskrift: {filename}' badge, FileText icon
B2B Virtual Products in Cart UI.our-catalog-physical renders: ✓ Shows name, price, quantity, 'Fysisk katalog' badge, BookOpen icon
B2B Virtual Products in Cart UI.our-catalog-digital renders: ✓ Shows name, price, quantity, 'Digital PDF' badge, BookOpen icon

Cart Summary Calculations.Subtotal correct: ✓ Correctly sums (price * quantity) for all items

Cart Operations for B2B Items.Quantity increase: ✓ + button increases quantity and updates totals
Cart Operations for B2B Items.Quantity decrease: ✓ - button decreases quantity and updates totals
Cart Operations for B2B Items.Delete item: ✓ Trash button removes item with toast notification

No Regression for Regular Products.Regular product renders: ✓ Shows name, price, quantity without B2B badges
No Regression for Regular Products.Mixed cart works: ✓ Cart can contain both B2B and regular products

Header Cart Badge.Item count correct: ✓ Badge shows sum of all item quantities
